title: stelis rutrum
intro: Stelis rutrum, also known as the Red Stelis, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is a type of orchid that is native to tropical regions and is known for its bright red, waxy flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are said to aid in wound healing and reduce pain and swelling. In herbal preparations, Stelis rutrum is often used to make infusions and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections.
